overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a modern waterfront commercial area. The player exits an indoor bar, walks along a wooden dock past futuristic architecture, and approaches parked sports cars in a sunny, high-detail urban environment with ray-traced lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic cafe interior with bar counter and neon signage

events.description: approaching and exiting the building through automatic glass doors

agents.ego_description: walking through the modern cafe interior toward the exit, passing bar stools and holographic signage

notable_agents.action: standing near the exit door wearing dark clothing, facing away from the camera

entered.detail: long metallic bar counter with perforated metal front and various bottles
holographic floating sign with cyan and pink neon colors displaying DONUTS text
tall bar stools with metallic bases lined along the counter
large automatic glass doors with green light strips leading outside

segments.scene_description: The player begins inside a sleek, modern cafe with dark wooden floors and a prominent bar counter on the right. A holographic neon sign floats near the ceiling, and the player walks steadily toward the glass exit doors where an NPC stands near the entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza between modern concrete buildings

events.description: exits indoor cafe into bright sunlight of outdoor urban plaza
approaching waterfront dock area with wooden walkways visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking across the sunlit concrete plaza toward the waterfront, passing parked vehicles

notable_agents.action: two people standing and conversing near a parked black limousine
black limousine parked against the concrete wall

entered.detail: wide open concrete pedestrian area with geometric patterns
distinctive multi-tiered black building with horizontal layered architecture
long black luxury vehicle parked near the wall
wide concrete staircase leading up the side of the building

segments.scene_description: Stepping out of the cafe, the scene opens into a bright sunlit plaza surrounded by modern concrete architecture. The distinctive tiered building looms in the distance on the left, while a black limousine is parked nearby with a few pedestrians standing beside it. The player continues walking toward the waterfront visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden waterfront walkway alongside cargo docks

agents.ego_description: walking along the wooden dock beside the water, passing shipping containers and dock equipment

entered.detail: elevated wooden plank walkway with metal railings along the water
calm harbor water reflecting the sunlight between dock structures
stacked shipping containers and industrial dock equipment
bright orange safety railings along the building edge

segments.scene_description: The player transitions onto a wooden waterfront walkway that extends along the harbor. The massive tiered building now dominates the left side of the frame at closer range, while cargo containers and dock structures line the right side along the water. Orange safety railings run along the building edge as the player continues forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront parking lot with luxury vehicles

events.description: transition from wooden dock to asphalt parking area with parked sports cars
slowing pace while approaching and examining the parked sports cars

agents.ego_description: walking through the parking lot examining the futuristic sports cars, moving slowly between vehicles

notable_agents.action: yellow sports car with black stripes parked in the lot
purple and black sports car parked next to the yellow vehicle

entered.detail: open asphalt parking area with marked spaces and scattered debris
futuristic yellow sports car with angular design and wide rear
sleek purple and black sports car with glowing accents
multi-story curved parking structure with horizontal levels

segments.scene_description: The player enters an asphalt parking area featuring several high-end futuristic sports cars, including a prominent yellow vehicle and a purple one. The tiered building is now visible in the distance to the left, while a large curved parking garage structure dominates the right side of the frame. The player slows down to examine the vehicles as the video ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from the dim, interior atmosphere of a modern cafe into a bright, expansive waterfront commercial district. It begins inside a sleek space with dark wooden floors and a floating holographic neon sign, moving steadily toward the glass exit doors. As the player steps outside, the scene opens into a sunlit plaza of concrete architecture where a black limousine and pedestrians appear before the path leads toward the harbor. The camera then transitions onto a wooden waterfront walkway, passing orange safety railings and cargo containers while a massive tiered building looms increasingly large on the left. Finally, the environment shifts to an asphalt parking area, where the camera slows to examine high-end yellow and purple sports cars positioned beside a large curved parking garage.
